title: The Maid of Sker
description: The Maid of Sker — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "The Maid of Sker" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: Bardie
memes.description: The mysterious shipwrecked orphan — the "maid of Sker" whose unknown origins, silent dignity, and eventual identification drive the novel's central mystery

memes.label: Braunton Burrows
memes.description: The expansive sand dune system on the North Devon coast — a place of exile, concealment, and crucial plot developments in the novel's later chapters

memes.label: Bunny
memes.description: Davy's orphaned granddaughter — a child of formidable appetite, innocent wisdom, and the domestic anchor of Davy's world

memes.label: Burial and Death
memes.description: The Gothic preoccupation with death, burial, and bodily mortality that pervades the novel's atmosphere and drives key narrative turns

memes.label: Candleston Court
memes.description: The seat of Colonel Lougher, local magistrate — a center of gentry authority whose legal proceedings structure the community's response to the Sker shipwreck

memes.label: Captain Nelson
memes.description: The historical figure Captain Horatio Nelson, who appears during Davy's naval service in the West Indies — an embodiment of naval duty and decisive command

memes.label: Colonel Lougher
memes.description: The local magistrate and gentleman of Candleston Court — a figure of civic authority whose legal proceedings frame the investigation into the shipwreck

memes.label: Davy Llewellyn
memes.description: The narrator and protagonist — an aged fisherman of the Glamorganshire coast, former Royal Navy sailor, and guardian of the orphan Bardie

memes.label: Death of Chowne
memes.description: The climactic death of Parson Chowne from canine madness — a scene of Gothic horror that enacts the novel's moral logic of poetic justice through physical destruction

memes.label: Discovery of Bardie
memes.description: Davy Llewellyn's discovery of a small child alone in a derelict boat at Sker — the event that gives the novel its central character and mystery

memes.label: Duty and Honor
memes.description: The moral code of naval service and gentlemanly conduct that governs characters' actions and provides the novel's ethical framework

memes.label: Evan Thomas
memes.description: The Welsh warren-keeper at Sker whose territorial claims over the shoreline bring him into conflict with Davy — a figure of local obstinacy rather than villainy

memes.label: Fishing
memes.description: Maritime livelihood and identity of the narrator Davy Llewellyn — fishing structures his daily life, social standing, and relationship with the Welsh coast

memes.label: Glamorganshire
memes.description: The historic Welsh county whose coastline — from Sker to Swansea — provides the novel's geographical frame and shapes its characters' lives through the rhythms of tide, fish, and weather

memes.label: Hezekiah
memes.description: A comically hypocritical religious dissenter and fish-buyer — a figure of satirical fun whose cowardice and greed make him a repeated target of Davy's narrative wit

memes.label: Identity and Disguise
memes.description: The theme of hidden and revealed identity — the central mystery of Bardie's origins and the novel's governing narrative secret

memes.label: Isolation
memes.description: The physical and psychological isolation of characters on the Welsh coast — a defining Gothic condition that shapes identity, vulnerability, and moral choice

memes.label: John
memes.description: A figure of the common sailor — one of the many naval and maritime working men whose collective presence anchors the novel in the world of Georgian seafaring

memes.label: Madness
memes.description: The Gothic motif of madness — as medical condition, moral collapse, and narrative intrusion — that erupts at the novel's darkest moments

memes.label: Money and Commerce
memes.description: The economic realities of coastal life — money, debt, profit, and patronage — that ground the novel's romantic plot in material conditions

memes.label: Newton Nottage
memes.description: The coastal village in Glamorganshire where Davy Llewellyn lives — a fishing community that provides the novel's domestic grounding and social world

memes.label: Parish and Church
memes.description: The parish church as the social and moral center of Welsh coastal community life — and the complex character of those who served it

memes.label: Parson Chowne
memes.description: The novel's principal antagonist — a corrupt, vengeful clergyman whose schemes entangle Davy, Bardie, and the entire coastal community

memes.label: Polly
memes.description: A young female character in the novel — a figure of youth, innocence, and the domestic affections that the Gothic plot threatens and ultimately restores

memes.label: Press-Gang
memes.description: The practice of forced recruitment into the Royal Navy, a threat hanging over coastal men and a key plot mechanism in the novel's later chapters

memes.label: Revenge
memes.description: The narrative drive of revenge — personal, familial, and cosmic — that propels characters toward confrontation and shapes the novel's moral architecture

memes.label: Rodney Bluett
memes.description: A naval comrade of Davy whose appearance in the novel's later chapters brings news, assistance, and the perspective of the wider maritime world

memes.label: Royal Navy
memes.description: The institutional backbone of Davy's identity and the novel's moral framework — the Royal Navy as a source of discipline, comradeship, and social mobility in Georgian Britain

memes.label: Sandy
memes.description: A Scottish character whose presence on the Glamorganshire coast introduces ethnic tension and comic rivalry into the novel's social landscape

memes.label: Sir Philip
memes.description: The wealthy Devonshire gentleman whose patronage and hidden connection to Bardie's origins make him the novel's offstage benefactor and ultimate reveal

memes.label: Sker
memes.description: The windswept coastal location in Glamorganshire — site of the shipwreck, the rabbit-warren, and the discovery of Bardie — that gives the novel its name and its Gothic atmosphere

memes.label: Sker House Household
memes.description: The isolated domestic establishment at Sker House — Evan Thomas's rabbit-warren, his wife Moxy's domain, and the uneasy refuge of Bardie and the children

memes.label: Smuggling
memes.description: The illicit coastal trade in contraband goods that permeated late-18th-century Welsh maritime communities and figures in the novel's moral economy

memes.label: Social Class
memes.description: The rigid yet permeable class structure of late-18th-century Britain, which governs characters' interactions, aspirations, and sense of identity throughout the novel

memes.label: Superstition
memes.description: The folk superstitions and supernatural encounters that infuse the novel's Gothic atmosphere, rooted in Welsh coastal culture and the narrator's susceptibility to signs and omens

memes.label: Susan
memes.description: A female character who appears in the novel's later chapters — a figure of domestic competence and quiet moral witness

memes.label: The Fishing Association
memes.description: The commercial fishing partnership formed by Davy with his wealthy patron — an organization that marks his transition from solitary laborer to man of substance

memes.label: The Impressment
memes.description: Davy's participation in the comic yet morally charged impressment of the tailor and Hezekiah — a scene of coerced naval recruitment rendered as dark farce

memes.label: The Inquest
memes.description: The official legal inquiry into the Sker shipwreck, conducted under Colonel Lougher's magistracy — a scene of civic process, contested testimony, and the limits of official knowledge

memes.label: The Parish
memes.description: The ecclesiastical and civil parish that structures community life in Newton Nottage — a framework of worship, poor relief, education, and moral oversight

memes.label: The Sea
memes.description: The sea as the novel's dominant physical and symbolic presence — a source of livelihood, danger, beauty, and moral meaning throughout the narrative

memes.label: The Sker Shipwreck
memes.description: The catastrophic shipwreck off Sker Point that drives the novel's opening plot — source of Bardie's arrival, the community's response, and the inquest that follows

memes.label: The Smuggling Ring
memes.description: The loose network of illicit traders operating on the Glamorganshire and Devon coasts — an informal organization whose activities blur the line between local economy and organized crime

memes.label: Watty
memes.description: A local boy at Sker whose fragmentary knowledge of the shipwreck and its aftermath provides Davy with crucial early information

memes.label: Wrecking and Salvage
memes.description: The economy and morality of shipwreck on the Welsh coast — a source of both desperate plunder and providential rescue in the novel
